name: @ouroboros/api
description: Shim package.json so Turborepo can run the FastAPI app alongside the Next.js app. All scripts bootstrap a local .venv (with uv) on first run, then exec inside it.

scripts.migrate: ./scripts/with-venv.sh bash -c 'uv run alembic upgrade head && uv run python -m ouroboros_api.seeds.bootstrap'
